fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: glamsterdam-devnet-6 launched hours ago; Gloas fork in ~40 min; EL: Besu, ethrex, Geth; CL: all except Teku
glamsterdam-devnet-5 stable for 3 weeks; Lighthouse range-sync bug outstanding; Prysm peering bug resolved
Spec bug (consensus-specs #5399) confirmed valid by Terrence; patch targeting devnet-7

eip_proposals_glamsterdam.highlight: EIP-7688 (progressive containers): 3 clients yes (Nimbus, Lodestar, Lighthouse), 3 maybe (Prysm, Teku, Grandine); targeting devnet-7; DFI deferred
EIP-8080 (consolidation exit mechanism): DFI'd; authors encouraged to re-propose for Hegota
EIP-8282 (builder execution requests): old contract on devnet-6 for workflow testing; updated contract (fee-per-enqueue) targets devnet-7; external audit post-devnet-7 (~end of July)

testing_progress.highlight: Pre-fork slashing test planned on devnet-6 just before Gloas fork activation
EIP-8282 contract constants under discussion: target=8, max=64 preferred over current 32/256; reduces builder withdrawability delay

client_updates.highlight: ePBS circuit breakers: Prysm uses consensus-block-based breaker (acknowledged as incorrect for ePBS); needs updating to track missing payloads, not beacon blocks

organizational.highlight: Lucid (encrypted mempool EIP-8184) seeking CL spec guidance; Justin Traglia volunteered to help Besu team
Glamsterdam mascot vote open; voting closes July 8

action_items.action: Review and approve Beacon API PRs (608, 580, 606, 621) by ACDT
Open PR against sys-asm repo for EIP-8282 contract constants (target=8, max=64); signal when contract is final for audit scheduling

decisions.decision: EIP-7688 (progressive containers) targeted for devnet-7; not DFI'd; revisit if devnet-6 instability warrants it
EIP-8080 (consolidation-based exits) DFI'd from Glamsterdam; authors may re-propose for Hegota
ePBS circuit breakers should track missing payloads (not beacon blocks); no standardization required, client-specific implementations acceptable

targets.target: EIP-8282 external audit — post devnet-7, ~end of July 2026
